name: kdcube
description: Official KDCube Claude Code plugins — build KDCube bundles with live-docs-grounded assistance.

plugins.name: kdcube-docs
plugins.description: KDCube documentation MCP and workflow skill for Claude Code. Ships the kdcube-dev documentation MCP and a skill that guides Claude through bundle authoring, configuration, ReAct concepts, and the platform's surface taxonomy. Triggers on KDCube, bundles, entrypoint.py with platform decorators, kdcube.copilot, and platform/SDK questions.
